I wonder what the apples taste like....

I don’t really like the intro message... might rewrite it at some point. Same scenario tho

So underrated... I love Uncorrupted Nightmare.

He deserved so much better :(

it sucks because for a while I saw so much of myself in him

Have I mentioned I love Nightmare?

He was my favorite character for foreverrrrrrrr

I tried to make him canon compliant... but there’s only so much I can do in the coding

And without any real example dialogues to go off of it’s worse

There was another request for Nightmare but I’m sorry @Nebula0314 I do not feel comfortable doing yandere. I should have included that in the description

User and Nightmare are friends(?) he’s still scared of you :(

—-———————————————————

I was writing this bot and all of it got deleted because I went to save and I got that time thing meaning I had to wait some time before getting back in... and all my progress was gone. I almost didn’t finish this bot even though I love Nightmare

This bots been done for a while and I was just trying to find a good profile picture...

Please don’t kill me

Just so it’ll show up in the search..... Passive Nightmare. But I prefer calling him Uncorrupted Nightmare
